case_title: SAUL SANTELL VS. DEREK MCCOMBS ET AL

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO AUG-12-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-18-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SANTELL, SAUL AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOMBS, DEREK KLEIN, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $125.00 - SERVED SEP-11-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOMBS, DEREK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SAUL SANTELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT(S) DEREK MCCOMBS AND RICHARD KLEIN ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVEIWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

TRIAL RESET TO OCT-18-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-12-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF SAUL SANTELL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTELL, SAUL
DECLARATION OF SAUL SANTELL RE:RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTELL, SAUL
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTELL, SAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCOMBS, DEREK KLEIN, RICHARD $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,200.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE FEES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
